message: Operation 'convertCurrency' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but description is vague about the conversion process. Missing critical input details (source currency, target currency, amount) and output details (converted amount, rate used). Enhanced description specifies all required parameters and return values, making it clear what the operation does and what an AI agent should provide/expect.

data.description_suggestion: Converts a specified amount from one currency to another using real-time exchange rates. Accepts source currency, target currency, and amount as parameters. Returns the converted amount and the exchange rate used for the calculation. Conversion is performed server-side using current rates.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is vague about the conversion process. Missing critical input details (source currency, target currency, amount) and output details (converted amount, rate used). Enhanced description specifies all required parameters and return values, making it clear what the operation does and what an AI agent should provide/expect.

data.current_description: Daily historical rates between date ranges (Startup/Pro plans only)
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve daily exchange rates for date range
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves daily historical exchange rates for a specified date range. Accepts base currency, target currencies, start date, and end date as parameters. Returns daily exchange rates for each day in the range. Available on Startup and Pro plans only. Useful for analyzing exchange rate trends over time.
data.reasoning: Summary is generic and doesn't clearly indicate the date range aspect. Description mentions plan restrictions but lacks input/output details. Enhanced summary specifies the date range functionality. Enhanced description clarifies required parameters (date range, currencies), return format (daily rates), plan requirements, and use case for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.
